dict.string: Pipit uses Bluetooth to securely connect to and communicate with your vehicle.
Pipit uses Bluetooth to securely connect to and communicate with your vehicle.
Pipit uses the camera to scan Whimbrel provisioning QR codes during onboarding.
Pipit uses your location to automatically detect your vehicle in the background and unlock it as you approach.
Pipit uses your location to automatically detect your vehicle in the background and unlock it as you approach.
